name: cpas-sandbox
description: CPAS Sandbox Debate System (Cowork_CPAS) — 2-session 16-turn architecture. v0.9.10: NO PREAMBLE tag fix (Skeptic/Advocate O-2-1 강화 — 도구 호출 프리앰블이 태그를 밀어내는 문제 수정). v0.9.9: Asymmetric tag system (Advocate R/19, Skeptic C/19), Skeptic A rebuttal-calibrated anchors, D-temperature 1-13 standardization, D-Q offensive pursuit phase. Session 1 (Exploratory 8T) + Session 2 (Offensive 8T). Dynamic Data Filters. Log management via cpas-manager plugin.
